chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1111 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 09.10.2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Nauman Shaikh, Advocate for respondents-SEPCO. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the respondents-SEPCO states that petitioner’s electricity service has been restored. While the petitioner’s Counsel acknowledges this restoration, he emphasizes that such future disconnections should be avoided. Counsel for SEPCO assures that the respondents will proceed legally in future. In these circumstances, this petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
